Project-local Deno skills

These skills were copied from https://github.com/denoland/skills
Upstream commit: 1a4267f4fc60d75839d740ae39a7e0bb0170cf0b
Installed into .github/skills for repo-local agent-skill support.

Included skills:
- deno-guidance
- deno-deploy
- deno-frontend
- deno-sandbox
- deno-project-templates
- deno-expert

Notes for this repo:
- This project is intended to become a Deno progressive web app for mobile-native Shikaku.
- Deno Deploy is the target hosting platform.
- Favor first-party Deno options when possible.

If you want, I can next scaffold the actual app structure for a daily-puzzle PWA.
